User.title: User Profile
User.description: Stores user roles and information for RBAC access control.

CMSAsset.title: CMS Asset
CMSAsset.description: Stores image URLs and simple text data for dynamic website rendering.

key.description: The unique identifier for the asset, e.g., 'home_hero_bg'.

value.description: The string value or URL of the asset.

updatedBy.description: UID of the admin who updated this.

SystemLog.title: System Diagnostic Log
SystemLog.description: Records runtime errors and system health events caught by the Watchdog system.

SampleRequest.title: Sample Request
SampleRequest.description: Captured leads from users requesting product samples.

/users/{userId}.description: User profiles for role-based access control.

/cms_assets/{docId}.description: Dynamic CMS assets for the public website. (Readable by all, writable by admins)

/system_logs/{logId}.description: Diagnostic logs for system monitoring. (Writable by all users for reporting, readable only by admins)

/sample_requests/{requestId}.description: Customer leads and sample requests. (Writable by all, manageable by admins)
